page_content:
### 3. Trevor Exley (Lab Supervisor)  
**Subject:** Quick Update — Arian Moridani  
Hi Trevor,  
I hope your postdoc in Italy is going great! I’ve been following your amazing work through LinkedIn and arXiv lately.  
I wanted to share a quick update: I’m applying to medical school while finishing my **M.S. in Computer Science** at **Georgia Tech**. I’m reaching out to **Dr. Jafari** for a letter now. Since we worked on the **TVIM publication** together, I'd appreciate it if you could highlight my contribution to the **MATLAB signal processing module** if he asks for input.  
I'm happy to hop on a 10-minute call this week to walk through any specifics. I've attached my updated CV and project summaries showing how I'm applying these skills in **Big Data for Health** today.  
Warmly,  
Arian Moridani  
---
